statsBand.heading: Team for fast, honest water heater service.

stats.label: Average service rating across Google & Yelp

emergencySection.heading: Water heater emergency? We're 30 minutes away.
emergencySection.paragraph: Tank leaking, flooding, no hot water in the dead of winter — we answer the phone 24/7, dispatch immediately, and most jobs are stopped/fixed within the same visit.

scenarios.title: Tank leaking or flooding
scenarios.desc: Emergency containment, water shut-off, replacement queued.

scenarios.title: No hot water at all
scenarios.desc: Pilot, thermocouple, gas valve — diagnosed within minutes.

scenarios.title: Pilot light won't stay lit
scenarios.desc: Most fixes done in 20–30 minutes on the first visit.

scenarios.title: Burst pipe near the heater
scenarios.desc: Same-day stop and full repair coordination.

emergencyStrip.text: Plumbing emergency? We respond in 30 minutes.

process.defaultTitle: From Call to Hot Water in 4 Steps
process.defaultSubtitle: Getting your water heater fixed is easier than you think — just four simple steps and comfort returns.

defaultSteps.title: Call or Book Online
defaultSteps.desc: Real person answers — no phone trees, no waiting.

defaultSteps.title: Free On-Site Diagnosis
defaultSteps.desc: Licensed tech arrives within hours and diagnoses on the spot.

defaultSteps.title: Upfront Written Quote
defaultSteps.desc: Clear price and scope before any work begins.

defaultSteps.title: Same-Day Service
defaultSteps.desc: Most jobs completed in a single visit, fully warrantied.

whyUs.paragraph: We're not the cheapest — we're the most reliable.

reviews.heading: Look What Our Clients Say
reviews.paragraph: Fast response, honest pricing, and work done right the first time — that's what our clients appreciate most.

finalCta.defaultHeadline: Ready to fix your water heater?
finalCta.defaultSubheadline: Same-day service, upfront pricing, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Call now or book online — we'll be there fast.

serviceAreas.heading: Serving All of Los Angeles
serviceAreas.paragraph: 30-minute average response across the city — we cover every major neighborhood.
